# Miami Yacht Collective

> Private yacht charter company in Miami, Florida. Hand-picked fleet of 9 vessels ranging from 28 ft to 90 ft. Available 24/7 for sunset cruises, birthday parties, bachelorette events, corporate charters, and full-day group experiences on Biscayne Bay and the open Atlantic. Direct line to the captain — no third-party platforms, no booking fees.

## Business Information

- Name: Miami Yacht Collective
- Address: 668 NW N River Dr, Miami, FL 33136
- Phone: (787) 664-5040
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/17876645040
- Email: sebastian@mcaiconsulting.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/miamiyachtcollective/
- Hours: Open 24 hours, 7 days a week
- Departures: From the Miami River dock, 10 minutes from Brickell and 15 minutes from Miami Beach
- Service area: Miami, Miami Beach, Biscayne Bay, Star Island, Fisher Island, Stiltsville, and offshore Atlantic itineraries

## Fleet (9 vessels)

- 90' Deep Blue with Jacuzzi — up to 30 guests — from $3,000 / 4 hrs
- 90' Acgua Alberti Superyacht — up to 30 guests — from $2,500 / 4 hrs
- 75' Ferretti Italian Motor Yacht — up to 20 guests — from $2,200 / 4 hrs
- 65' Azimut L'chaim — up to 20 guests — from $2,200 / 4 hrs
- 62' Anvera — up to 15 guests — from $1,700 / 4 hrs
- 55' Azimut — up to 15 guests — from $1,600 / 4 hrs
- 48' Isabella with Jetski — up to 13 guests — from $1,250 / 4 hrs
- 46' Maxum — up to 10 guests — from $899 / 4 hrs
- 28' Axopar Brabus Edition Sport Boat — up to 13 guests — from $1,200 / 4 hrs

All charters include licensed captain and crew. Charters depart from 668 NW N River Dr on the Miami River.

## Common Use Cases

- Sunset cruises (most popular)
- Birthday celebrations on the water
- Bachelorette and bachelor parties
- Corporate events and team outings
- Anchor and swim at Nixon's Sandbar
- Day trips to Stiltsville
- Photoshoots and content production
- Sport boat day with watersports (Axopar)
- Group celebrations on the 90' superyachts

## How to Book

Most charters are confirmed in under 10 minutes by phone or WhatsApp. The team checks availability live, matches the right yacht to the group size and event type, and holds the date before the call ends. No web form, no platforms, no broker markup.

- Call: (787) 664-5040
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/17876645040

Lines are open 24 hours, 7 days a week.
